rationale: The total weight is the sum of the pallets and the crates. There are 3 pallets, each weighing 18 kg, so pallets weigh 3 * 18 = 54 kg. Each pallet holds n crates, so total crates = 3n, each 12 kg, so crate weight = 3n * 12 = 36n kg. Total weight: 54 + 36n = 894. Solving: 36n = 840 → n = 840 / 36 = 23.333... This is not an integer, but checking the options, if n=23, total crate weight = 3*23*12 = 828, pallets = 54, total = 882 ≠ 894. If n=25: 3*25*12=900, +54=954.
